
Seed: 3 | first-ready turn: not ready through T4
===== SIMULATE THIS =====
Scenario: strict-jit/go-first | DCI: strict-JIT | Locks: none
Mulligans: 1
Opening player-known state: Active=Latias ex [-] | Bench=(none) | Hand=Steven's Resolve, Roseanne's Backup, Mysterious Treasure, Serena, Fire Energy, Mawile-GX | Discard=(none)
DEBUG ONLY: prizes=Mega Dragonite ex, Team Yell's Cheer, Mysterious Treasure, Regidrago VSTAR, Chaotic Swell, Oricorio GRI 55. Policy may use them only after a legal deck or Prize inspection.
Policy rule: strict and matchup-flex JIT require a payload to enter discard in the same player turn as the ready-state check.
T1 | DRAW | rules: R-GAME-DRAW | start-of-turn: Grass Energy
T1 | TURN START | rules: R-GAME-FIRST-TURN | Going first: drew for the turn; no Supporter or attack is permitted.

T2 | DECK KNOWLEDGE | rules: P-KNOWLEDGE-01 | Steven's Resolve: deck inspected; Prize identities are now deducible for later decisions.
T2 | PLAY SUPPORTER | rules: R-STEVEN-01; R-GAME-SUPPORTER | Searched up to 3 cards: Regidrago V, Crispin, Brilliant Blender. Turn ended.
T2 | TURN END | rules: R-STEVEN-01 or R-RV-01 | Active=Latias ex [-] | Bench=(none) | Hand=Roseanne's Backup, Mysterious Treasure, Serena, Fire Energy, Mawile-GX, Grass Energy, Mega Dragonite ex, Regidrago V, Crispin, Brilliant Blender | Discard=Steven's Resolve

T3 | BENCH | rules: R-GAME-BENCH | Regidrago V from hand.
T3 | BENCH | rules: R-GAME-BENCH | Regidrago V from hand.
T3 | ATTACH | rules: R-GAME-ENERGY | Grass Energy manually to Regidrago V.
T3 | PLAY SUPPORTER | rules: R-CRISPIN-01; R-GAME-SUPPORTER | Searched Grass Energy and Fire Energy; attached Grass Energy to Regidrago V and put Fire Energy into hand.
T3 | POLICY | rules: P-AXIS-01 | End: Active=Latias ex [-] | Bench=Regidrago V [GG]; Regidrago V [-] | Hand=Roseanne's Backup, Mysterious Treasure, Serena, Fire Energy, Mawile-GX, Mega Dragonite ex, Brilliant Blender, Fire Energy | Discard=Steven's Resolve, Crispin

T4 | ATTACH | rules: R-GAME-ENERGY | Fire Energy manually to Regidrago V.
T4 | DISCARD | rules: R-SERENA-01 | Mega Dragonite ex (Serena chosen discard)
